query:
SELECT 
  dtc.contract_external_id,
  dtc.period,
  dtc.is_suspended,
  dtc.is_bad_debt_row,
  dtc.is_close_row,
  dtc.principal,
  dtc.interest,
  dtc.fee,
  dtc.penalty,
  dtc.unlock_fee,
  dtc.amount,
  dtc.debt_range,
  dtc.due_date
FROM debt_target_cache dtc
JOIN contracts c ON c.id = dtc.contract_id
WHERE c.contract_external_id = 'CT0225-NYK003-9251-01'
ORDER BY dtc.period ASC
LIMIT 20;
